# Story-NNNN: <short title>

- **Status:** draft | ready | in progress | done
- **Lane:** tiny | normal | high-risk  (see [framework/05-risk.md](../framework/05-risk.md))
- **Related plan:** <link>
- **Priority:** high | medium | low

## Story

As a **<role>**, I want **<something>**, so that **<benefit>**.

## Acceptance criteria

The story is done when all of the following are true:

- [ ] <verifiable condition 1>
- [ ] <verifiable condition 2>
- [ ] <verifiable condition 3>

## Proof

Tie "done" to verification evidence. Fill only the tiers the lane requires
(tiny: skip; normal: unit/integration; high-risk: add e2e/platform).

| Tier | Needed? | Status | Evidence |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Unit | yes / no | not yet / partial / pass | <link / command> |
| Integration | yes / no | not yet / partial / pass | <link / command> |
| E2E | yes / no | not yet / partial / pass | <link / command> |
| Platform | yes / no | not yet / partial / pass | <link / command> |
